description: The structure covering a building; the overhead protection from weather. 'Toru' names what shelters from above—the cover that defines inside from sky.
sound_symbolism: The word tops over. 'To' caps with defining cover, roof placed. Then 'ru' runs across the span, shelter extending.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'toru' (the roof). Works with 'moru' (wall) and 'tomae' (floor) to form shelter. The horizontal above.

pillars.peace-linguistics-practices: Roof as shared protection—under one roof means community, family, belonging.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Roof as first architecture—shelter from rain and sun, the defining element of dwelling.
